message:
🐛 Allow PTY resize on font change + resize tests (#157)

Remove suppressPtyResize during font size changes so tmux gets new
cols/rows dimensions when font size changes in tile mode. Previously
the session kept old dimensions causing layout mismatch.

Adds 3 new vitest tests:
- onResize fires after font change + fit()
- PTY resize NOT suppressed during font changes in tile mode
- Tile font derivation (globalFontSize - 3 for 2+ tiles)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
